title: pelargonium × intermedium
intro: Pelargonium × intermedium, also known as the middle-leaf geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, resulting from the cross-breeding of Pelargonium tomentosum and Pelargonium cucullatum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Pelargonium × intermedium include relief from anxiety, depression, and insomnia, as well as its use in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
